attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
TVOUTPUT.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,             
TVOUTPUT.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRDT_PRICE_AMT,
TVOUTPUT.VALIDATED_NET_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT,
TVOUTPUT.DSTRBTR_RPTD_CST_UNT_PRC_AMT,  
TVOUTPUT.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT,       
TVOUTPUT.POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY,          
TVOUTPUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM,                
TVOUTPUT.EDW_CREATE_USER,               
TVOUTPUT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                
TVOUTPUT.EDW_UPDATE_USER,               
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT,
Coalesce
( 
Max(Cast(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT AS DATE) - INTERVAL '1' DAY ) Over (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT
ORDER	 BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT  ASC
ROWS BETWEEN 1 Following
                AND       1 Following), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DT,
                'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
CASE	WHEN ( Row_Number() Over(PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT
ORDER	 BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC)= 1 ) 
	AND	N_POS.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 'U'
 ELSE 'I'  
END	AS DML_TYPE,
 TVOUTPUT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
TVOUTPUT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
TVOUTPUT.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
TVOUTPUT.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG,
TVOUTPUT.IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG,
TVOUTPUT.GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,          
TVOUTPUT.GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
      /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
  ,TVOUTPUT.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,TVOUTPUT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,TVOUTPUT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,TVOUTPUT.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
FROM	
(
SELECT	
TVINPUT.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,             
TVINPUT.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRDT_PRICE_AMT,
TVINPUT.VALIDATED_NET_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT,
TVINPUT.DSTRBTR_RPTD_CST_UNT_PRC_AMT,  
TVINPUT.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT,       
TVINPUT.POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY,          
TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM,                
TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_USER,               
TVINPUT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                
TVINPUT.EDW_UPDATE_USER,               
START_TV_DT,
TVINPUT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
TVINPUT.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
TVINPUT.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
TVINPUT.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG,
TVINPUT.IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG,
TVINPUT.GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT AS GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,          
TVINPUT.GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT AS GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
     /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 TVINPUT.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,TVINPUT.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,TVINPUT.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,TVINPUT.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT, /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
Row_Number() Over( PARTITION BY
BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,             
BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRDT_PRICE_AMT,
VALIDATED_NET_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT,
DSTRBTR_RPTD_CST_UNT_PRC_AMT,  
VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT,       
POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY,
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT
     /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
  ,TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
--,TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
ORDER	BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC) AS ROW_NUM
FROM	
(
SELECT	
TV1.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,             
TV1.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRDT_PRICE_AMT,
TV1.VALIDATED_NET_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT,
TV1.DSTRBTR_RPTD_CST_UNT_PRC_AMT,  
TV1.VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT,       
TV1.POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY,          
TV1.EDW_CREATE_DTM,                
TV1.EDW_CREATE_USER,               
TV1.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                
TV1.EDW_UPDATE_USER,               
TV1.START_TV_DT    ,
TV1.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
TV1.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
TV1.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
TV1.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG,
TV1.IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG,
TV1.GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT,          
TV1.GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT 
    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
  ,TV1.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,TV1.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,TV1.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,TV1.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
FROM 	
(
SELECT	
BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AS BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,       
Cast(BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRDT_PRICE_AMT,
Cast(VLDTD_NET_UNIT_PRICE_USD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS VALIDATED_NET_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT,
		 
Cast(DISTI_RPTD_COST_UNIT_PRICE_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DSTRBTR_RPTD_CST_UNT_PRC_AMT,
		
Cast(VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT,
		      
POS_TRX_LINE_PRODUCT_QUANT AS POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY,           
EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
Cast(LAST_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM AS DATE) AS START_TV_DT ,
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG,
IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG,
GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT ,
GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT 
     /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
  ,TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
FROM $$WORKDB.W_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE PTL 

UNION
 ALL 

SELECT	
BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,       
Cast(BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRDT_PRICE_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRDT_PRICE_AMT,
Cast(VALIDATED_NET_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS VALIDATED_NET_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT,
		 
Cast(DSTRBTR_RPTD_CST_UNT_PRC_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS DSTRBTR_RPTD_CST_UNT_PRC_AMT,
		
Cast(VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT,
		      
POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY AS POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY,           
EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
Cast(EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS DATE) AS START_TV_DT ,
/* Modified as part of SFP Rel : BKG_POS TV ETL, wf_W_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE_TV failing frequently in TS3 due to data issue */
Coalesce(RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
Coalesce(RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
Coalesce(RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,-999.000000) AS RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
INTERNAL_POS_FLAG AS CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG,
IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG,
GLBL_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT,          
GLBO_PRC_LST_UNT_PRC_LCL_AMT
     /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
  ,TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
FROM	 $$STGDB.WI_POS_AMY_INCR
WHERE	BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT NOT IN (
SELECT	BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT 
FROM	$$WORKDB.W_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE) 

UNION
 ALL
SELECT	
BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT  ,       
BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRDT_PRICE_AMT,
VALIDATED_NET_UNT_PRC_USD_AMT,  
DSTRBTR_RPTD_CST_UNT_PRC_AMT , 
VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT,       
POS_TRX_LN_PRDT_QTY,           
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
START_TV_DT,
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT,
/* Added as part of SFP Rel */
CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG,
IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG,
GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,          
GLOB_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
     /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
  ,TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* AI Bookings MVP4 MAY REL */
FROM	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LN_DELTA_TV N_POS
WHERE	N_POS.END_TV_DT=Cast('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
	AND	(EXISTS (
SELECT	1 
FROM	$$WORKDB.W_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE W_POS 
WHERE	W_POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=N_POS.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT ) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_POS_AMY_INCR W_BKG WHERE W_BKG.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT=N_POS.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT)))
TV1)  TVINPUT
QUALIFY	Row_Number() Over (PARTITION BY BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,START_TV_DT 
ORDER	BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC) =1
 )TVOUTPUT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LN_DELTA_TV N_POS 
	ON	N_POS.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT=TVOUTPUT.BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT 
	AND	N_POS.END_TV_DT=Cast('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
WHERE	TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM=1
